title: alkanna matthioli
intro: Alkanna matthioli, also known as Alkanet, is a flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the Balkan Peninsula and parts of the Mediterranean region. The root of the Alkanna matthioli plant contains alkannin, a pigment with anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant for various health issues. The health benefits of Alkanna matthioli include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Alkanna matthioli can be prepared in herbal form as a root extract, capsule, or tea, and is also used as a natural food coloring and dye.
